name: Artillery Catapult Turtle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>砲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>撃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のカタパルト・タートル
desc: You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon 1 "Gaia The Fierce Knight" monster, or 1 Level 5 Dragon monster, from your hand or Deck. You can only use this effect of "Artillery Catapult Turtle" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon 1 "Gaia The Fierce Knight" monster, or 1 Level 5 Dragon monster, from your hand or Deck. You can only use this effect of "Artillery Catapult Turtle" once per turn.
